name: Arena Sports Mill Creek
address: 13500 Bothell Everett Hwy, Mill Creek, WA 98012
about: Arena Sports Mill Creek is a multi-sport and family entertainment venue that includes indoor golf simulators among its many activities. The facility is part of a larger organization focused on providing year-round sports programs for all ages, including soccer, camps, and various recreational activities. The indoor golf simulator is accessible as part of their broader offerings, catering to casual players and families looking for entertainment options beyond traditional golf courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Part of a larger multi-sport venue with diverse activities
Family-friendly environment suitable for casual golfers
Accessible alongside other recreational options like soccer and climbing

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available through the Eat & Drink section of the venue
Alcohol service available at the venue's dining facilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental policies, but it's common for multi-sport venues with simulators to provide basic equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site dining through their Eat & Drink section, though specific BYOB policies aren't mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical simulator rounds usually take 45-90 minutes depending on the simulator software and player pace, but specific timing details aren't provided.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Arena Sports is explicitly family-friendly with various activities for kids, including soccer programs and a dedicated indoor golf simulator.
